# Repair tracking with multiple ranges having different actions.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
----

# r1: 2 voters, config says 3 → AddVoter.
# r2: 3 voters, s3 dead → ReplaceDeadVoter.
# r3: healthy 3 voters → no repair.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
  range-id=2
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
  range-id=3
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# Mark s3 dead for r2.
update-store-status store-id=3 health=dead leases=shedding replicas=shedding
----
dead shedding=leases,replicas

repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1
ReplaceDeadVoter: r2, r3

# s3 comes back: r2 and r3 no longer need repair, r1 still does.
update-store-status store-id=3 health=ok leases=ok replicas=ok
----
ok accepting all

repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1
